reviews.评论: I had trouble printing regular pages and it would a page and a half. Tech support told me it was my phone, so I called Apple and even though they don‘t offer support for printers the wonderful tech told me to turn off VPN and it printed as it should. So I have to turn off my VPN every time I want to just print regular pages or reports. Next I tried to print photos and the all prints are  portrait even though the photo shows a landscape print on the print screen using Epson app. I‘m going to call Epson tech support for the third time and see if they know how to fix my landscape printing problem. They did not help at all the first two times. I solved my own problem the first time. Apple knew how to fix the problem the second time although it was not my phone. Why can‘t it print the photos as shown on their printing app screen? Total disappointment for this IT Tech!

reviews.标题: Easy to use but worth it to buy a nicer more expensive one
reviews.评论: It’s really convenient and an easy set up. Not terrible for the price, but I am relatively disappointed:/Ink usage isn’t as great as I had hoped based on other reviews. It says that it prints 5 color prints in 1 minute, but in spite of excellent internet, and all updates on the hardware… I timed it at 110 seconds which is just shy of twice as long as advertised.The color print quality is SIGNIFICANTLY lower than I had expected. I have a picture below of the exact same quality of print from identical pdf attached. The top row was from an HP printer and the bottom row is the Epson 2800.I had even tried two different brands of paper thinking that may be the culprit, but to no prevail.

Prints extremely slow. Tried all the suggested troubleshooting, but still did not work. Only printed faster if using the app to print. Scanning also takes 2 minutes per scan. Photo quality is decent but overall would not recommend.
6 months in: Complete failure. No support for this product. Waste of money. Can’t fix the problem because Epson doesn’t offer any solutions for this printer. Don’t buy.

This was a huge FAIL. The printer is only 2.4g. My internet, computer and phone all operate on 5g. The computer will not work with the printer. In order to make a print I have to take a USB cord, connect the printer to the computer with a cord and generate the print. I suppose then it will print but this is a brand new printer, I want it to be cordless operation.  Packing it up and sending it back

Today it said I had a paper jam. I followed procedure on YouTube and checked front and back. NO JAM.  Called Epson and they require photos of ink tubes, ink level Error Message etc.  Way too much for a 4 month old printer that doesn‘t work for an unknown reason. Buy at your own risk!! Wish I could put a 0.  It worked great until it didn‘t

I thought the printer being lightweight was a positive thing, but it just means the printer is made with cheap plastic. After ONE paper jam, the feeder always pull in paper in an angle. The components to roll the paper through had couple pieces fell off just from 1 jam. More hassle for me to take it in for fixing.

reviews.标题: Jams Constant - Double Sided Printing too complicated
reviews.评论: Worst printer I‘ve ever used.. constantly jamming and wont print both sides unless you take paper out manually and flip it over. Don‘t get this.

Always software problems.Extremely slow printing.Haven‘t even used up the first batch of any of the colors including black.Now says paper jam but all is clear.Customer support says past warranty. So now I guess it‘s target practice.

we bought this two years ago. It worked at first but then we had to clean the print heads at least twice to make it run without streaks in the printing. less than two years later, we get a message saying the waste tank was at the “end of life for the waste tank“. we called customer service and he said he could give us 40% off refurbished or 15% of a new printer. Basically, as soon as the waste tank is full, your machine is done. And every time you clean the print heads, it deposits into the waste tank. So, cleaning the printheads speeds up the machines demise. We will not be buying this or any other epson product ever again.

Absolutely the worst printer I ever had the misfortune to use. 99% of the time the printer has issues moving the paper through. Does not matter how much of little paper is in it. I only used it once where it worked. It either jams or I have to feed the paper through manually. Not a chance to print any bigger than a page because of this because if I can even get one page because it starts printing before the paper is where it needs to be. I use to sell printers and would always recommend Epson but if I had to today I would never.

Wasn’t the greatest printer to begin with but then when the ink pad needed to be replaced I completely gave up and I ordered another printer.  After a little over a year I was expecting to get more of a return on my investment.
It doesn’t print DOUBLE SIDED!!!! Also won’t hook up to WiFi so I have to use a usb cord and it’s a special epson USB. Idk how this has such good reviews.
IT STOPPED PRINTING AFTER TWO MONTHS, NO MATTER WHAT I‘VE DONE TO “CLEAN“, “RESET“ ETC., PER EPSON INSTRUCTIONS.DON‘T WATE YOUR MONEY!

There’s always a paper jam and it always prints at an angle and never straight even with the paper feeder to help. Cancelling a job takes forever and when you try to cancel a print job or go back home it says invalid so I am always turning it off and on. I can’t print any design because it’s always “printing” and the paper is constantly coming out blank. Do no not recommend for sublimation use, go with a better printer that is not Epson.

reviews.标题: Worst printer purchase of my life!!  Not recommended.
reviews.评论: Absolutely the worst printer I have ever wasted my money on...  This was my first time buying an Epson printer and boy have I regretted it.  I did read all the reviews saying that it was a nightmare to connect to WIFI, but since the printer was to be located adjacent to my router, I figured that wouldn‘t be an issue for me.  WRONG.  Every single day and sometimes multiple times in the same day, I struggled through the process of reconnecting it to the wifi, including rebooting the server multiple times.  After a few weeks, I said enough is enough and got rid of it.  I bought a lovely HP 5101 Smart tank which practically set itself up within minutes.  I will never buy another Epson and urge you all to strongly re-consider this before making your purchase.  Life is too short and time is too valuable to waste it fighting with a stupid printer.

reviews.标题: Make sure you know your operating system before you buy this printer.
reviews.评论: I am very disappointed in this printer. It works from my phone, but not from my HP computer which runs in Windows 11 S mode. I cannot get it installed. We are not told this directly in the product specifications. I have lost all trust in Epson.  Customer service for Epson was very nice, but unhelpful. And another thing, the USB port is a B model, not what most of us have, the A model. They do not provide it for you, and it must be purchased in addition to the computer. Even with the port, it will not work with Windows 11 S mode. Once again, that should be in the product specifications.

reviews.标题: Avoid, printer is not worth it
reviews.评论: An absolute nightmare to setup and stopped working after a few months of minimal use. It went right in the garbage and I‘ll never buy Epson again.

reviews.标题: Does NOT print on both sides.
reviews.评论: VERY disappointed!  Will NOT print on both sides. Even old printers do that. 0 stars  Also Wi-Fi connect cumbersome. Had to do manually. Using Epson app did not work

reviews.标题: Wish I‘d bought a higher model
reviews.评论: Poor paper handling, frequent paper jams, no automatic paper feed, nn FAX

Had for about a year now. It prints fine. However many pop-ups for software updates, selling toner and services. Hoping to avoid that but seems hard to avoid in any printer these days. Why I knocked off another star is that the power button does not work when trying to turn it off. After pressing it  always receive instructions to hit the back or forward arrow for questions that appear on the printer window screen. After doing that, it always says I cannot power off at this time. So I am continually plugging and unplugging it in to save on the electric bill and the contstant beeping if I do not respond to a software update immediately. The software update also appears on my pc monitor with no way to disable it until you run the update.

This is the poorest quality printer I can remember having. The ink cartridge system was dysfunctional for me. Even when there was ink in the cartridges, the printer would not recognize it. We were constantly having to remove the cartridge and shake them so they would work. Being a low cost printer, one would not expect quality construction and this J1010DW met that expectation. We have finally discarded the printer for recycling.

Ink ran out way too fast. Bought a larger ink cartridge... “compatible“ but not Brother brand. This printer bitches and screams about printing without Brother cartridge. Works, if you use the mobile app, but whatever. Hard work all around. Screw this. It‘s going to the curb. Will put a FREE sign on it and it can be someone else‘s problem. WOULD NOT RECCOMMEND. Also, the interface is janky as hell. I could go on, but I‘ve wasted enough time on this junk.
Worst printer/scanner ever. Jams all the time and won’t reset when you clear it. I’m throwing it in the garbage. So frustrated!!!
Description says the machine will fax. It does NOT!

reviews.标题: Price Too good to be true
reviews.评论: Arrive without the yellow ink cartridge :(  Can‘t order just a yellow :(

If I could give this less than one star I would. I‘ve gone through two of these. They are unreliable, frequently disconnect from your wi-fi and fall apart inside of a year or less. Spend a little more and get something good. Because this is NOT one of those good ones.

This printer is a piece of junk.  DO NOT BUY IT! When it arrived and I tried to set it up, the cyan ink cartridge was dried up so I got a message there was not enough ink for the printer to maintain quality.  I contacted Brother, and they sent me a replacement cartridge. Again, the Cyan cartridge did not work and the message kept saying there was not enough ink to maintain quality.  I called Brother again, and they sent yet another ink cartridge.  SAME MESSAGE. I had written some of my information on the set-up booklet so I am sure Amazon will not take it back and refund my money. Since I don‘t have a printer, I can‘t return it because I can print the return sticker.

It’s been three hours of installation., and I haven’t been able to print anything. This printer is a hassle. It makes me download an app and then download a program into my computer as well. And then, before going through all of that, it gives me their ink publicity. It is so stressful. And I haven’t been able to even print anything yet. Smh 🤦‍♂️ printer can’t connect, never ending spinning mode
DON‘T BUY, YOU WILL NOT BE ABLE TO REPLACE ANY INK CARTRIDGES LISTED ON AMAZON!!!!

reviews.标题: Brother ink cartridge quality control is poor
reviews.评论: I have a brother printer and purchase their ink cartridges and have been having issues with the quality of their cartridges. I have had 3 black ink cartridges in a row that have been delivered with no ink in them (empty). Brother has refused to back these cartridges, and as a result I will purchase a printer from another company that hopefully has better quality

Flimsy and very cheaply made.Spent several hours & couldn‘t get it to print.Spent several more hours with Brother support doing the exact same things I did the day before and THEY couldn‘t get it to work.  Was told by Brother support that it‘s a new model with kinks that need to be worked out.  (Now they tell me!!)Save your money.

reviews.标题: Set 2 HOURS aside just to set this up.  :(
reviews.评论: Not sure how “smart“ this printer is if it took my husband 2 HOURS of updates to hardware and software and other frustrations simply to set it up the first time.  I‘ve got a bad feeling about this.  In spite of the reviews, I‘m wondering if this will just end up being another POS like our last 2 printers. Gone are the days of ease and quality, I‘m afraid.
HORRIBLE printer... It has endless errors and is cheaply made.  Don‘t bother...

reviews.标题: Would NOT recommend.  Wish I had never purchased it.
reviews.评论: This printer is proving to be a piece of junk.  When, yes when it decides to print, it is often delayed.  The black starter ink did not last long.  When I was having. problems getting the latest document to print, it said the black ink was low.  Not out, but low.  Changed the cartridge thinking it might help.  NOPE.  Still getting the message the black ink is low.  Also seems to be having a problem keeping connected to the internet.

Let me say this printer is not easy to setup - I am on 45 minutes already and not done.  The instructions for setup of the physical and software setup is very lacking.  I wanted to try something other than an HP printer but HP is easier to setup.  Would not buy again.

reviews.标题: Sleazy Paywall Tactics That Lock You Out Of Printing (Please read before buying!)
reviews.评论: This printer locks you out of printing if even one cartridge is low. I have no yellow ink, but I have a half a cartridge of black ink. I need to print something in black only... it will not let me print ANYTHING until I replace the yellow ink.This is what we call a “paywall“ in software... they‘ve implemented a hardware paywall.Sleazy tactics that I do not appreciate and therefor I will NEVER buy a single Brother product ever again. This is how they want to trick customers... that is not the type of professional relationship I continue. This is a business transaction after all.

reviews.标题: Cartuchos de cortas duracion , solo acepta los de su marca
reviews.评论: Los cartuchos no duran absolutamente nada !
Junk don’t waste your money. This is a piece of crap that lasted 4 months after an update caused the printer to become unresponsive
The ink level is off so it is impossible to rate the print quality.

reviews.标题: The worst purchase I have ever made
reviews.评论:
This printer is the the most terrible, uneconomical POS I have ever had the displeasure of using.
Set up from my cell phone was easy and done in minutes. Sounds like a compliment, however...
It is an immense struggle getting anything else to sync with the printer. It will randomly just be unavailable FOR NO REASON! It doesn‘t matter what we try to send, it fails without explanation. Even the test page will fail. This includes both wired and wireless jobs. It will literally be unavailable to the wired connection.

The printer boasts about its auto-document feeder and 2 sided copying: HA HA HA HA HA HA What a nightmare!
The document feeder works fine
The 2 sided copying ONLY WORKS when you cycle thru the settings and select 2 sided (remember to set it back to normal every time)
Want to feed your 2 sided document in to get 2 sided copies? NOPE! You have to feed 2 one sided documents to get the 2 sided copy.
Are we having fun yet?
Now for my most despised feature:
THE STUPID INK CARTRIDGES PRINT AN AVERAGE OF 90 PAGES BEFORE NEEDING TO BE REPLACED!!!! Hey, if you’re lucky, you’ll get a black ink replacement for $25, usually more like $30.
You would pay less to take your documents to CVS or a Copy/Print shop. AWESOME!

In all fairness:
The printer quality is beautiful
It’s light weight and compact, perfect for home or cramped dorms
It’s relatively quiet and fast (if it’s nice enough to allow you to connect)

I HATE IT! The lower prince lured me in. This was a gift for my elderly mother to print her weekly meeting documents, send fax or scan as needed. SHE CANNOT WORK IT WITHOUT ME, no one can. She must think I hate her for buying her such a beautiful useless piece of crap. I wish I knew in time to return it. Now I’m going to buy her another printer and will have to have this one destroyed so no innocent unsuspecting person finds it and thinks it will be useful. This is the Annabelle of printers (minus the killing), it will send you down a dark path of rage and frustration.

reviews.标题: must have color and black ink in for it to work
reviews.评论: good product except you have to buy both ink packs to have it operational just putting black ink in wont work . I dont need color ink prints so forces me to buy color anyways

Terrible printer! This is the 2nd Canon PIXMA I have bought and the first one was FAR better than this one! Will not be buying another. Prints in purple instead of black. Photos prints come out horrible. Buy something else!

This printer is an absolute total piece of garbage. Please do not end up like me being stuck with this thing. It is unreliable. Always has some type of problem. Worst printer I have ever owned. Id gove zero stars if I could. It is that bad.
Not a good printer keep jamming

reviews.标题: Does not even print half the time. Uses an insane amount of ink. Do not waste your money
reviews.评论: Do not waste your money on this printer. It is garbage. Half the time it does not even print. Turn it off, turn it back on. Does not matter. Will let you down when you need it most.  Additionally, the amount of ink it uses is ridiculous. I have never had a printer that went thru ink so fast! Switching back to HP. I highly recommend you do not waste your money on this hunk of garbage.

When it works it works well. Other times it has issues connecting to the internet, especially when it‘s been on for a while and just hangs requiring a shutdown and restart. It has issues feeding paper straight through the document feeder when scanning no matter how I align it. It‘s also prone to paper jams when printing multiple sheets, especially in two sided print mode.
YOU HAVE TO CALL AN THEY TRY TO SELL YOUA SET UP FOR 150.00 TO SET IT UP  DONT BUY IT
Biggest piece of crap, not even worth one star

Garbage -- trying to get this piece of crap to connect has made me want to take a hammer to it. I use the printer about 2-3 times a year, and every time, whether I use my phone or my PC, I have to endure the nightmare of the wi-fi connection process, which repeatedly fails. I retired from IT after 30 years. PC support was one of the many hats I wore. I loved Canon products, but this is my second Canon printer, and I will no longer purchase another Canon product, not even its cameras.
The worst printer! It‘s very flimsy. It arrived damaged twice! The inks that were supplied weren‘t full!Do not buy!

reviews.标题: will not work with Windows 10 S mode or Windows 11 S mode
reviews.评论: Software will not work with Windows 10 S mode or Windows 11 S mode.You can opt out of S mode but you are losing some of your security.The easiest way for me was to link printer with my WIFI.Quick and easy. After you link to your WIFI, you may have to go into settings on your laptop and find your printer.

reviews.标题: Worst steaming POS printer I EVER bought - jams every chance it gets, cant even print 1 page!!
reviews.评论: WHen I initially bought it, I went through the difficult “load the app“ setup, that took about 5 tries to finally connect to anything. Once it did, I put one sheet of paper in to test print, and it immediately jammed which I needed to clear by pulling bits of paper out of its back access panel. I FINALLY got it to print the needed document/s, then it sat for a few months. TRying to use it again, I could not get ONE EFFING SHEET OF PAPER to print, either by loading just one, or a stack of about 20 of them, jamming every time during 6 attempts. At one point, it pulled in and crumpled a sheet, and the indicator window said “No Paper in Front Tray“. I should have returned it IMMEDIATELY upon its first jamming issue, and I urge anyone with the same issues when first setting up, to just return it and try any other brand. Now I have to go through a painful tech support session where I am sure they will blame me for doing everything wrong, but I am very familiar with using many different inkjet and laser printers through the years.
Searched for printers that are meant to be ARM compatible and two websites said this one was and it is not.  Other than that, it is a basic mid ink jet printer that I‘m now saddled with.
Horrible. Do not buy. It’s like a cheap piece of plastic. You will immediately have problems with it.
Has the brain of a base model roomba

Bought at Best Buy in early August 2025. Very frustrating product. Keeps sending random error codes which seem impossible to cancel. Error codes appear out of the blue. Nothing that I do or fail to do seems to impact its lack of performance. I bought this TR4720 after having worn out a similar earlier model Canon which I used for many years. This one has been a huge disappointment.

Do not buy this printer.  The color quality is garbage.  I had one paper jam, removed the paper per the instructions, and after that the paper would no longer load and jammed every time.  Absolute piece of junk.
Complicated to use
Constant connection issues and paper jams

reviews.标题: Not compatible with Apple Silicon Macs!!!
reviews.评论: I ordered this as an owner of a Mac with an M4 chip. The software is no longer compatible and Silhouette‘s support site mentions that not only is it not - but they have no plans of updating the software. Extremely disappointed and unable to return as I waited too long to break this out and set it up.
The stamps are super fast and easy to make, but they are extremely shallow, and can only be used on paper
